description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a gable roof, surrounded by a fenced yard featuring both grass and paved areas. The house has a large wooden deck extending from the back, with landscaped garden beds and a small pool or water feature adjacent to the deck. The property includes a driveway leading to a covered garage on one side, and the yard is dotted with a few mature trees. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with large sliding glass doors opening onto the deck. The front entryway is accessible via a paved path and is subtly integrated into the facade, lacking ornate columns or a prominent porch.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, fenced yard, wooden deck, garage, and landscaped garden areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, garage, driveway, and a large wooden deck with garden beds.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the backyard, deck, pool, and the overall layout of the fenced property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, large grassy yard, and the deck area.
description_view_3: View from the backyard, focusing on the deck, grassy area, and the rear elevation of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Subtle main entry with a paved path, no prominent porch or columns, integrated into the facade
